memberdef.name: __HAL_RCC_TIM2_CLK_ENABLE
memberdef.initializer: do { \ __IO uint32_t tmpreg; \ SET_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR1, RCC_APB1ENR1_TIM2EN); \ /* Delay after an RCC peripheral clock enabling */ \ tmpreg = READ_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR1, RCC_APB1ENR1_TIM2EN); \ UNUSED(tmpreg); \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: __HAL_RCC_TIM6_CLK_ENABLE
memberdef.initializer: do { \ __IO uint32_t tmpreg; \ SET_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR1, RCC_APB1ENR1_TIM6EN); \ /* Delay after an RCC peripheral clock enabling */ \ tmpreg = READ_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR1, RCC_APB1ENR1_TIM6EN); \ UNUSED(tmpreg); \ } while(0)

memberdef.initializer: do { \ __IO uint32_t tmpreg; \ SET_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR1, RCC_APB1ENR1_WWDGEN); \ /* Delay after an RCC peripheral clock enabling */ \ tmpreg = READ_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR1, RCC_APB1ENR1_WWDGEN); \ UNUSED(tmpreg); \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: __HAL_RCC_TIM2_CLK_DISABLE
memberdef.initializer: CLEAR_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR1, RCC_APB1ENR1_TIM2EN)

memberdef.name: __HAL_RCC_LPTIM2_CLK_DISABLE
memberdef.initializer: CLEAR_BIT(RCC->APB1ENR2, RCC_APB1ENR2_LPTIM2EN)

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the APB1 peripheral clock.

simplesect.para: After reset, the peripheral clock (used for registers read/write access) is disabled and the application software has to enable this clock before using it.
